openmeter/productcatalog/adapter.purpose: Ent/PostgreSQL adapter for the feature entity: implements feature.FeatureRepo (CRUD + archive + list) against the openmeter/ent/db schema and exposes Tx/WithTx/Self for transaction propagation.

patterns.name: FeatureRepo constructor
patterns.description: NewPostgresFeatureRepo(db *db.Client, logger *slog.Logger) returns feature.FeatureRepo; always inject *db.Client from Wire, never construct inline.

patterns.name: TxCreator + TxUser implementation
patterns.description: transaction.go implements Tx(), WithTx(), Self() on featureDBAdapter so callers can use entutils.TransactingRepo without bypassing the ctx-bound transaction.

patterns.name: WithMeter edge for MeterSlug backward compat
patterns.description: Every query that returns a Feature must WithMeter(mq.Select(dbmeter.FieldID, dbmeter.FieldKey)) to populate the deprecated MeterSlug field for v1 API compatibility.

patterns.name: Dual-column MeterGroupByFilters storage
patterns.description: On write, store advanced filters in AdvancedMeterGroupByFilters and legacy equality-only in MeterGroupByFilters; on read, prefer AdvancedMeterGroupByFilters if non-empty.

patterns.name: Archive guard cross-checks plan and subscription references
patterns.description: ArchiveFeature queries active plans and active subscriptions referencing the feature before setting ArchivedAt; return ForbiddenError if any active reference exists.

patterns.name: UnitCost type-switch on read and write
patterns.description: All UnitCost mutations must clear the other type's DB columns (e.g. when switching manual→llm, clear UnitCostManualAmount). MapFeatureEntity applies the same type-switch on read.

key_file_guides.role: All feature CRUD: CreateFeature, UpdateFeature, GetByIdOrKey, ArchiveFeature, HasActiveFeatureForMeter, ListFeatures, MapFeatureEntity.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Missing WithMeter edge on any new query returns broken MeterSlug; failing to clear opposite type's columns on UnitCost update corrupts the stored cost.

key_file_guides.role: Implements entutils.TxCreator and entutils.TxUser[FeatureRepo] via HijackTx + db.NewTxClientFromRawConfig.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Do not add business logic here; this file must remain pure transaction plumbing.

key_file_guides.role: Integration tests using testutils.InitPostgresDB and dbClient.Schema.Create; tests run in parallel behind a sync.Mutex.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Tests create a real meter row first to satisfy FK constraints; skip this and inserts will fail.

anti_patterns: Using c.db directly in a helper function that accepts *db.Client instead of calling entutils.TransactingRepo — bypasses ctx transaction.
Omitting WithMeter edge on a new query returning Feature — breaks MeterSlug for v1 callers.
Editing files under openmeter/ent/db/ — generated code, never edit manually.
Returning feature.FeatureNotFoundError instead of models.NewGenericNotFoundError — noted as FIXME in code but new code should use generic errors.

decisions.decision: Dual MeterGroupByFilters columns (legacy map[string]string + advanced typed filters)
decisions.rationale: v1 API predates typed filter support; both columns are maintained for backward compatibility while new code uses the advanced column.
Ent transactions propagate implicitly via ctx; exposing Tx/WithTx/Self lets callers use entutils.TransactingRepo without leaking transaction types into domain interfaces.

code_examples.scenario: Add a new field to Feature: write it on create, clear it on update, read it in MapFeatureEntity

openmeter/productcatalog/driver.purpose: v1 HTTP handlers for the feature sub-domain of productcatalog: implements FeatureHandler (GetFeature, CreateFeature, ListFeatures, DeleteFeature) using the httptransport pattern, plus response mapping and error encoding.

patterns.name: httptransport.Handler per operation
patterns.description: Each operation is returned as a typed alias (e.g. GetFeatureHandler = httptransport.HandlerWithArgs[Req,Resp,Params]). Decoder, operation func, and encoder are injected at construction; never implement ServeHTTP directly.

patterns.name: Namespace resolution via namespaceDecoder
patterns.description: All handlers call h.resolveNamespace(ctx) which delegates to namespacedriver.NamespaceDecoder.GetNamespace; failure returns 500. Never hardcode or skip namespace resolution.
patterns.example: ns, err := h.resolveNamespace(ctx); if err != nil { return ... }

patterns.name: Centralised error encoder via getErrorEncoder()
patterns.description: errors.go defines getErrorEncoder() that chains commonhttp.HandleErrorIfTypeMatches for each domain error type. Always pass httptransport.WithErrorEncoder(getErrorEncoder()) in handler options.

patterns.name: LLM pricing enrichment post-operation
patterns.description: GetFeature checks feat.UnitCost.Type == UnitCostTypeLLM and calls resolveLLMPricing + enrichFeatureResponseWithPricing after the main operation. New handlers with LLM features must follow this post-enrichment pattern.
patterns.example: if feat.UnitCost != nil && feat.UnitCost.Type == feature.UnitCostTypeLLM { pricing := resolveLLMPricing(...) }

patterns.name: Union response for paginated vs flat list
patterns.description: ListFeatures returns commonhttp.Union[[]api.Feature, pagination.Result[api.Feature]] — Option1 for flat list (page.IsZero()), Option2 for paginated. New list handlers must follow this dual-mode pattern.

key_file_guides.role: FeatureHandler interface and featureHandlers struct with all four operation implementations.
key_file_guides.watch_for: MeterSlug-to-MeterID resolution in CreateFeature decoder — must call meterService.GetMeterByIDOrSlug before calling connector.CreateFeature.

key_file_guides.role: getErrorEncoder chains feature and meter domain errors to HTTP status codes.
key_file_guides.watch_for: New domain error types must be registered here; unregistered errors fall through to 500.

key_file_guides.role: Bidirectional mapping: MapFeatureToResponse, MapFeatureCreateInputsRequest, domainUnitCostToAPI, apiUnitCostToDomain, resolveLLMPricing, enrichFeatureResponseWithPricing.
key_file_guides.watch_for: apiUnitCostToDomain uses Discriminator() to dispatch; adding a new UnitCostType requires a new case here and in the domain switch.

anti_patterns: Returning namespace errors with status other than 500 — internal server error is the correct code when namespace cannot be resolved.
Calling connector methods before namespace resolution.
Omitting httptransport.WithOperationName — breaks OTel span naming.
Hardcoding page size limit (1000) without reusing commonhttp constants.

decisions.decision: MeterSlug-to-MeterID translation lives in the HTTP decoder, not the connector
decisions.rationale: The v1 API accepts meterSlug for backward compat; the domain works with MeterID. Translation at the boundary keeps the connector clean.

openmeter/productcatalog/feature.purpose: Domain package for feature entities: defines FeatureConnector (service), FeatureRepo (repository interface), Feature struct, input/output types, UnitCost types, MeterGroupByFilters, Watermill events, and FeatureMeters resolution logic.

patterns.name: FeatureConnector over FeatureRepo
patterns.description: Business logic (meter validation, key uniqueness check, event publishing) lives in featureConnector which wraps FeatureRepo. Never call FeatureRepo directly from outside this package; always go through FeatureConnector.

patterns.name: Input validation before repo call
patterns.description: All connector methods validate inputs (e.g. meter aggregation check, key-is-ULID guard, UnitCost.Validate(), UnitCost.ValidateWithMeter()) before delegating to featureRepo.
patterns.example: if _, err := ulid.Parse(feature.Key); err == nil { return Feature{}, models.NewGenericValidationError(...) }

patterns.name: Event publishing after successful mutation
patterns.description: CreateFeature, UpdateFeature, ArchiveFeature each publish a typed event (FeatureCreateEvent, FeatureUpdateEvent, FeatureArchiveEvent) after the repo write. Events implement EventName() and EventMetadata() for Watermill.

patterns.name: nullable.Nullable[UnitCost] for partial updates
patterns.description: UpdateFeatureInputs.UnitCost uses oapi-codegen/nullable.Nullable to distinguish unset (validation error), null (clear), and value (update). Check IsSpecified/IsNull/Get accordingly.
patterns.example: if input.UnitCost.IsNull() { /* clear */ } else if input.UnitCost.IsSpecified() { v, _ := input.UnitCost.Get() }

patterns.name: FeatureMeters dual-index resolution
patterns.description: ResolveFeatureMeters returns FeatureMeterCollection with ByKey (latest non-archived per key) and ByID (all requested IDs). Key lookup resolves to the latest active feature; explicit IDs remain addressable even if archived.

patterns.name: UnitCost mutual-exclusion validation
patterns.description: UnitCost.Validate() enforces that for LLM type, each dimension (provider, model, token_type) has exactly one of property OR static value. Adding a new dimension requires adding it to both Validate() and ValidateWithMeter().
patterns.example: if u.LLM.ProviderProperty != "" && u.LLM.Provider != "" { errs = append(errs, errors.New("mutually exclusive")) }

key_file_guides.role: featureConnector implements FeatureConnector; contains all domain validation logic and event publishing. Also defines input types CreateFeatureInputs, UpdateFeatureInputs, ListFeaturesParams.
key_file_guides.watch_for: TODO comment says refactor to Service pattern — do not add more methods to FeatureConnector without following that future refactor direction.

key_file_guides.role: Defines FeatureRepo interface (CRUD + entutils.TxCreator + entutils.TxUser[FeatureRepo]) and ArchiveFeatureInput.
key_file_guides.watch_for: FeatureRepo embeds TxCreator and TxUser — any new adapter must implement Tx(), WithTx(), Self().

key_file_guides.role: UnitCost, ManualUnitCost, LLMUnitCost types; Validate() and ValidateWithMeter(); LLMTokenType constants.
key_file_guides.watch_for: New token types must be added to the validTypes map inside Validate().

key_file_guides.role: ResolveFeatureMeters, FeatureMeterCollection, resolveFeatureMeters, getLastFeatures, latestEntity generic.
key_file_guides.watch_for: getLastFeatures prefers non-archived; if all archived, returns most recently archived — callers must handle archived features being resolved.

key_file_guides.role: Watermill event structs for create/update/archive; each implements EventName() (subsystem + name + version) and EventMetadata().
key_file_guides.watch_for: Event version is hardcoded as v1 — bump version as a new constant if the event payload changes.

key_file_guides.role: Feature struct, domain error types (FeatureNotFoundError, FeatureInvalidFiltersError, FeatureWithNameAlreadyExistsError, ForbiddenError), MeterGroupByFilters with Validate and conversion helpers.
key_file_guides.watch_for: FIXME note: use models.NewGenericNotFoundError instead of FeatureNotFoundError in new code.

anti_patterns: Calling featureRepo directly from outside the feature package — always go through FeatureConnector.
Setting UnitCost without calling Validate() and ValidateWithMeter() for LLM type.
Publishing events before the repo write succeeds — always publish after.
Using context.Background() instead of the passed ctx in connector methods.
Adding a new UnitCostType without updating the validTypes map in Validate() and adding cases in adapter MapFeatureEntity.

decisions.decision: FeatureConnector wraps FeatureRepo to keep validation and event publishing in the domain layer, not the adapter
decisions.rationale: Adapters are pure persistence; validation (meter aggregation, ULID key guard, unit cost) and side-effects (events) belong in the connector so they run regardless of which adapter is used.

decisions.decision: Features support key-based versioning via archive: same key can have multiple archived versions plus one active
decisions.rationale: Plans and subscriptions reference features by key; archiving without replacement allows existing references to resolve to the most-recent version via getLastFeatures.

code_examples.scenario: Add a new UnitCostType 'fixed_fee' with its own sub-struct

openmeter/productcatalog/http.purpose: Shared HTTP utilities for the productcatalog domain: validation error encoding (ValidationErrorEncoder with ValidationIssues extension), bidirectional API↔domain mapping for RateCards/EntitlementTemplates/Prices/Discounts, and ResourceKind constants.

patterns.name: ValidationErrorEncoder wraps models.ValidationIssues
patterns.description: ValidationErrorEncoder(kind ResourceKind) converts []models.ValidationIssue into a validationErrors extension field on the problem+json response. Attach per-resource-kind; call with ResourceKindPlan or ResourceKindAddon.

patterns.name: Discriminator-based RateCard mapping
patterns.description: AsRateCard uses r.Discriminator() to dispatch to AsFlatFeeRateCard or AsUsageBasedRateCard. FromRateCard uses r.Type() switch. Any new RateCard type requires cases in both directions.

patterns.name: Price type dispatch via price.Type()
patterns.description: FromRateCardUsageBasedPrice dispatches on price.Type() (Flat, Unit, Tiered, Dynamic, Package). New price models require a new case in both FromRateCardUsageBasedPrice and AsRateCard.
patterns.example: switch price.Type() { case productcatalog.FlatPriceType: ... case productcatalog.TieredPriceType: ... }

key_file_guides.role: FromRateCard, AsRateCard, AsFlatFeeRateCard, AsUsageBasedRateCard, FromRateCardUsageBasedPrice, FromTaxConfig, FromEntitlementTemplate, FromDiscounts and inverses.
key_file_guides.watch_for: UsageBasedRateCard requires non-nil BillingCadence; returns error if nil. FlatFeeRateCard BillingCadence is optional.

key_file_guides.role: ValidationErrorEncoder and validationError private type with AsErrorExtension serialization.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Returns false (not handled) if models.AsValidationIssues returns no issues — falls through to generic encoder.

key_file_guides.role: ResourceKind string type with ResourceKindPlan and ResourceKindAddon constants.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Add new ResourceKind constants here when adding new top-level resources to the productcatalog.

anti_patterns: Adding business logic to mapping functions — they must be pure conversions with no side-effects.
Skipping error return from FromRateCard or AsRateCard — both can return errors on unsupported types.
Using this package from outside productcatalog without considering that it imports api (v1) types.

decisions.decision: Separate http package for shared productcatalog HTTP utilities rather than embedding in each sub-package
decisions.rationale: RateCard and price mappings are reused across plan, addon, and subscription HTTP handlers; centralising avoids duplication.

openmeter/productcatalog/testutils.purpose: Test helpers for productcatalog integration tests: TestEnv wiring all productcatalog services against a real Postgres DB, and factory helpers for Feature, Plan, Addon, Meter, and Namespace fixtures.

patterns.name: TestEnv via NewTestEnv
patterns.description: NewTestEnv(t) spins up a real Postgres DB via testutils.InitPostgresDB, wires feature/plan/addon/planaddon services from raw adapters (not app/common), and exposes all services. Always call env.DBSchemaMigrate(t) before use.

patterns.name: eventbus.NewMock for event assertions
patterns.description: TestEnv uses eventbus.NewMock(t) as the publisher so tests can assert Watermill events were published without needing a real Kafka.

patterns.name: Factory helpers return input types not domain types
patterns.description: NewTestFeature, NewTestPlan, NewTestAddon, NewTestFeatureFromMeter return Create*Input structs, not the created entities — caller must call the service to persist.
patterns.example: input := testutils.NewTestFeature(t, ns); feat, err := env.Feature.CreateFeature(ctx, input)

patterns.name: meteradapter.TestAdapter as meter service
patterns.description: TestEnv uses meteradapter.TestAdapter (SetDBClient(client)) instead of real meter.Service; tests must add meters to the DB client directly.

key_file_guides.role: TestEnv struct and NewTestEnv factory that wires all productcatalog services; DBSchemaMigrate and Close lifecycle.
key_file_guides.watch_for: env.Close uses sync.Once — safe to defer multiple times. Client and db are both closed; do not close them externally.

key_file_guides.role: NewTestPlan with BillingCadence P1M, USD currency, ProRating enabled, CreditThenInvoice settlement.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Default plan has no phases — pass phases as variadic args if rate cards are needed.
NewTestFeatureFromMeter uses ConvertMapStringToMeterGroupByFilters on meter.GroupBy — only creates eq filters.

key_file_guides.role: NewTestMeters returns three canonical meters: api_requests_total (count), tokens_total (sum), workload_runtime_duration_seconds (sum).
key_file_guides.watch_for: IDs are generated with NewTestULID(t) — unique per test run, do not hardcode IDs when using these.

anti_patterns: Importing app/common in tests — use raw adapter constructors as done in NewTestEnv to avoid import cycles.
Calling env services before DBSchemaMigrate — Ent schema must be applied before any write.
Sharing a TestEnv across parallel tests without a mutex — each parallel test should create its own TestEnv.

decisions.decision: Wire services from raw constructors (not app/common Wire sets)
decisions.rationale: Importing app/common from domain testutils creates import cycles and couples tests to unrelated wiring changes.
